records.m_Talk_ENG: Not bad today, not bad. We found a lot of useful-looking things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I found something. Let me share this screen.

records.m_Talk_FRA: J'ai trouv959 quelque chose. Regarde 95wa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's this? Some of that Old Administration legacy tech that I've only heard about?

records.m_Talk_FRA: C'est quoi94p? Une de ces l959gendaires reliques technologiques de l'Ancienne Administration94p?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it is, what's it doing out there on the street?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Beats me, but today must be our lucky day. I'll bring it with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surfacing succeeded. If we waited one more minute, we could have gotten swept into that storm.
